operations.value: Some small randomized trials report reduced stress-related fatigue or improved mental performance with standardized Rhodiola rosea extracts, but results are inconsistent and a rigorously conducted nursing-student trial did not establish benefit; the evidence should be considered preliminary rather than definitive.
operations.notes: Balances potentially positive fatigue findings with the inconclusive nursing-student randomized trial and review-level risk-of-bias concerns.

sources.title: Rhodiola rosea for physical and mental fatigue: a systematic review
Rhodiola Rosea for Mental and Physical Fatigue in Nursing Students: A Randomized Controlled Trial

notes: Adds a cautious stress-related fatigue synthesis without implying established treatment efficacy.
